GetItems.displayName: List rows present in a table

parameters.name: File
parameters.description: Select an Excel file through File Browse.

parameters.name: Table
parameters.description: Select a table from the drop-down.

parameters.name: Filter Query
parameters.description: An ODATA filter query to restrict the entries returned.

parameters.name: Order By
parameters.description: An ODATA orderBy query for specifying the order of entries.

parameters.name: Top Count
parameters.description: Total number of entries to retrieve (default = all).

parameters.name: Skip Count
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip (default = 0).

parameters.name: Select Query
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of columns to retrieve (first 500 by default).

parameters.name: DateTime Format
parameters.description: DateTime Format.

returns.raw: The outputs of this operation are dynamic.

parameters.name: File
parameters.description: Select an Excel file through File Browse.

returns.raw:
| Name | Path | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| value | value | array of object |  |
| Id | value.id | string | Table Id. |
| Name | value.name | string | Table name. |
| Show banded columns | value.showBandedColumns | boolean | Show banded columns. |
| Highlight first column | value.highlightFirstColumn | boolean | Highlight first column. |
| Highlight last column | value.highlightLastColumn | boolean | Highlight last column. |
| Show banded rows | value.showBandedRows | boolean | Show banded rows. |
| Show filter button | value.showFilterButton | boolean | Show filter button. |
| Show headers | value.showHeaders | boolean | Show headers. |
| Show totals | value.showTotals | boolean | Show totals. |
| Style | value.style | string | Table style. |
